get.description: List notifications for the current authenticated user

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: Number of notifications to return per page.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of notifications to skip (offset pagination).

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by notification category. 0 = User activity, 1 = System announcements, 2 = Trading alerts.

parameters.name: isRead
parameters.description: Filter by read status. true = only read, false = only unread.

patch.description: Mark all notifications as read for current user

parameters.description: Number of transaction records to return.

parameters.description: Filter by transaction status (e.g. PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED).

parameters.description: Start date filter (ISO 8601 format). Returns transactions created on or after this date.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date filter (ISO 8601 format). Returns transactions created on or before this date.

parameters.description: Cursor string for cursor-based pagination. Omit for the first page.

post.description: Send a one-time password to the specified email for registration, password reset, withdrawal, or transfer verification.

400.description: Invalid email address or unsupported purpose.

post.description: Verify OTP to get a special-purpose token for subsequent actions like registration or password reset.

200.description: Returns a short-lived, single-purpose token upon successful OTP verification.

400.description: OTP is invalid, expired, or email does not match.

post.description: Create a new user account using a verified register token from /auth/verify-otp. Returns JWT tokens or a challenge if MFA is required.

200.description: Returns access token + user object, or ChallengeRequiredResponse when MFA is needed.

400.description: Invalid register token, email already exists, or username taken.

post.summary: Register a new user and auto-login

post.description: Authenticate using a Google or Apple ID token from the React Native SDK.

200.description: Returns access token + user object on success.

post.description: Generate a one-time nonce to be embedded in the SIWE message before wallet signing.
Verify an EIP-4361 signature to authenticate or register a user via their Web3 wallet.

200.description: Returns access token + user object on success.

400.description: Invalid signature, nonce mismatch, or expired nonce.

post.description: Authenticate with email/password credentials. Returns JWT tokens or an MFA challenge if enabled.

200.description: Returns access token + user object, or ChallengeRequiredResponse when MFA is needed.

post.description: Reset the user password using a verified reset token from /auth/verify-otp.
Check whether the given email address is already registered in the system.
Validate whether a referral code exists and is eligible for use during registration.

200.description: Returns validity of the reference code.

post.description: Initiate an MFA challenge for a sensitive operation such as withdrawal or transfer. Returns a challengeId to be verified with the chosen MFA factor.
post.summary: Create an auth challenge for sensitive purposes

post.description: Submit the MFA code (TOTP or Email OTP) to complete a challenge and receive a verified challengeId for downstream actions.
Change the password for the currently authenticated user. Requires the old password for verification.

200.description: Return user info from token payload

get.description: List social posts with filtering and sorting

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: Number of records to return per page.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip (offset-based pagination).

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter posts by a specific author user ID.

parameters.name: assetId
parameters.description: Filter posts tagged with a specific asset ID.

parameters.name: followingOnly
parameters.description: When true, returns only posts from authors the current user follows.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search term to match against post content.

post.summary: Create DAO proposal for an asset

patch.summary: Mark a passed proposal as executed (admin)

sources.description: Optional provider subset to sync. Empty means all enabled providers.

avatar.description: Publicly accessible URL of the new avatar image.

username.description: New username. Must be 3-100 characters: only letters, numbers, and underscores allowed.

bio.description: Short bio or description displayed on the user profile. Maximum 255 characters.
bio.example: Crypto enthusiast & RWA investor. Building the future of finance.

coverAvatar.description: Publicly accessible URL of the cover/banner image for the profile.

displayName.description: Display name shown on the profile (may differ from username).

action.description: Relation action to apply to the target user

referenceCode.description: Referral code to associate with this account. Can only be set once.

fullName.description: Full legal name as it appears on the official identity document.

dob.description: Date of birth in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

idNumber.description: Government-issued national ID, passport, or driver's license number.

idFrontImg.description: Publicly accessible URL of the front-side image of the identity document.

idBackImg.description: Publicly accessible URL of the back-side image of the identity document.

selfieImg.description: Publicly accessible URL of the selfie image for liveness/identity verification.

reason.description: Reason for rejecting a KYC submission
reason.example: Uploaded documents are blurry and unreadable

legalDocumentUrls.description: Legal document URLs (title deed, legal docs, custody authorization)

totalSupply.description: Total supply of this asset token

isHot.description: Whether this asset is highlighted as hot

symbol.description: Ticker symbol used to identify the asset (e.g. EURUSD, AAPL, GOLD).

priceSourceSymbol.description: Symbol used to fetch real-time price from the data provider (may differ from display symbol).

name.description: Human-readable display name of the asset shown in the UI.

categoryId.description: ID of the asset category (e.g. Forex, Crypto, Stocks, RWA).

logo.description: Publicly accessible URL to the asset logo/icon image.

digit.description: Number of decimal places for displaying the asset price (0-20).

spread.description: Asset spread type: floating or fixed

profitCurrency.description: Currency used for profit and PnL

chartMode.description: Chart mode: 0 = Bid Price, 1 = Ask Price

trade.description: Trade mode: 0 = Full Access, 1 = Only Buy, 2 = Only Sell

referencePrice.description: Reference price (NAV) maintained by admin/independent valuation report

priceBandPercentage.description: Allowed order price band around NAV (e.g. 0.1 = +/-10%, 0.15 = +/-15%)

minTradeSize.description: Minimum allowed trade volume (lot size) as a decimal string.

maxTradeSize.description: Maximum allowed trade volume (lot size) as a decimal string.

volumeStep.description: Step increment for trade volume (e.g. 0.01 means orders must be multiples of 0.01).

pipSize.description: Pip size for the asset (e.g. 0.0001 for EUR/USD).

slippage.description: Maximum allowed price slippage in pips during order execution.

swapType.description: Swap calculation type (e.g. Points, Percent, Currency).

approved.description: Approve or reject due diligence result

spvEntity.description: SPV legal entity after custody transfer

legalTransferDocs.description: Legal transfer documents (URLs, signed contracts, handover docs)

snapshotDate.description: Snapshot date/time. Defaults to immediate execution if omitted.

commissionRate.description: Commission rate as a decimal fraction. E.g. 0.20 = 20%, 0.05 = 5%.

isActive.description: Whether this commission event configuration is active and will generate rewards.

rewardIds.description: Array of commission reward IDs to claim in a single batch operation.

amount.description: Deposit amount as a decimal string. Must be a valid positive number.

idempotencyKey.description: Client-generated UUID v4 to prevent duplicate deposit submissions (idempotency).

address.description: User wallet address (non-custodial). The backend does not store private keys. Must be a valid blockchain address.

type.description: Wallet chain type. EVM for Ethereum-compatible chains, SOL for Solana.

chainId.description: EVM chain ID. 1 = Ethereum Mainnet, 56 = BSC Mainnet, 97 = BSC Testnet, 11155111 = Sepolia.

amount.description: Withdrawal amount as a decimal string.

destinationAddress.description: Destination blockchain wallet address to send funds to.

chainId.description: Target EVM chain ID for the withdrawal. 1 = Mainnet, 56 = BSC, 97 = BSC Testnet, 11155111 = Sepolia.

idempotencyKey.description: Client-generated UUID v4 to prevent duplicate withdrawal submissions.

challengeId.description: Verified challengeId from POST /auth/challenge/verify — proves MFA was completed.

amount.description: Amount to transfer as a decimal string.

assetId.description: Asset ID to transfer. If omitted, transfers the default balance currency (USDT).

toUserId.description: Recipient user ID. Either toUserId or toEmail must be provided.

toEmail.description: Recipient email address. Either toUserId or toEmail must be provided.

idempotencyKey.description: Client-generated UUID v4 to prevent duplicate transfer submissions.

challengeId.description: Verified challengeId from POST /auth/challenge/verify — proves MFA was completed.

status.description: New transaction status to apply. Use COMPLETED when the on-chain transaction is confirmed.

transactionHash.description: On-chain transaction hash. Required when status is COMPLETED.

rejectedReason.description: Reason for rejection or cancellation. Required when status is FAILED or CANCELLED.

idempotencyKey.description: UUID v4 to prevent double-execution of the same status update.

chainId.description: EVM chain ID of the network to sweep funds from. 1 = Mainnet, 56 = BSC, 97 = BSC Testnet, 11155111 = Sepolia.

destinationWallet.description: Destination wallet address to aggregate all swept funds into.

privateKey.description: Private key of the admin wallet used to sign sweep transactions. Handle with extreme care.

orderIds.description: Array of order IDs to cancel

cancel.description: Set to true to cancel the order. If true, other fields are ignored

price.description: New limit/stop price. Only applicable for non-MARKET orders

stopLossPrice.description: New stop loss price. Optional, set to null to remove

takeProfitPrice.description: New take profit price. Optional, set to null to remove

price.description: Limit price (required for LIMIT orders, ignored for MARKET)

idempotencyKey.description: Client-generated UUID to prevent duplicate submissions

maxTotalCost.description: Max total cost for MARKET BUY orders to lock funds safely.

subject.description: Subject category of the support ticket.

message.description: Initial message content describing the issue. Between 1 and 5000 characters.
message.example: My withdrawal of 100 USDT submitted 2 days ago is still pending. Transaction ID: TXN_123.

title.description: Optional human-readable title for the ticket.

category.description: Optional category tag to route the ticket to the correct team.

priority.description: Optional priority label (free-form string). Examples: low, medium, high, urgent.

attachments.description: Array of attachment URLs (e.g. screenshots, transaction receipts).

subject.description: Updated subject category of the ticket.

status.description: Updated ticket status (managed by support agents).

content.description: Message content to send in the support thread. Between 1 and 5000 characters.
content.example: Thank you for the update! I can confirm the withdrawal was received.

messageType.description: Message type. 0 = plain TEXT message, 1 = IMAGE message.

attachments.description: Array of attachment URLs for this message.

email.description: User email address. Required for registration or password reset.

purpose.description: Purpose of sending OTP. Determines the downstream action after verification.

email.description: User email address that the OTP was sent to.

otp.description: 6-digit numeric One-Time Password sent to the email.

purpose.description: Purpose of the OTP — must match the purpose used in send-otp.

registerToken.description: Short-lived registration token returned by /auth/verify-otp. Proves the user owns the email.

username.description: Desired username. Must be 3-100 characters, containing only letters, numbers, and underscores.

password.description: Account password. Min 8 characters — must include at least 1 lowercase, 1 uppercase, 1 digit, and 1 special character.

referenceCode.description: Referral code of the user who invited this account.

avatar.description: Publicly accessible URL to the user avatar image.

provider.description: Social identity provider to authenticate with.

idToken.description: ID token issued by the social provider (obtained from React Native SDK).

walletAddress.description: Optional EVM wallet address to scope the nonce (checksummed, 0x-prefixed).

message.description: EIP-4361 (SIWE) formatted message that was signed by the wallet.
message.example: example.com wants you to sign in with your Ethereum account...

signature.description: Hex-encoded ECDSA signature produced by the wallet over the message.

nonce.description: Random nonce previously issued by GET /auth/web3/nonce to prevent replay attacks.

walletAddress.description: EVM wallet address to cross-check ownership (checksummed, 0x-prefixed).

email.description: Registered email address of the user.

newPassword.description: New password. Min 8 characters — must include at least 1 lowercase, 1 uppercase, 1 digit, and 1 special character.

email.description: Email address to check for existing registration.

referenceCode.description: Referral code to validate before using it during registration.

purpose.description: Sensitive action purpose that requires an MFA challenge.

payload.description: Optional context payload attached to the challenge (e.g. withdrawal details).

factor.description: MFA factor used to complete the challenge.

code.description: The OTP or TOTP code for the chosen factor.

oldPassword.description: Current (old) password of the authenticated user.

newPassword.description: New password. Min 8 characters — must include at least 1 lowercase, 1 uppercase, 1 digit, and 1 special character.

type.description: Media type attached to the post.

link.description: Publicly accessible URL of the media resource (image or video).

content.description: Main text content of the post. Supports plain text up to 10,000 characters.
content.example: Just opened a long position on $AAPL — bullish on earnings! 🚀

linksUrl.description: Optional list of image or video attachments. Maximum 10 items.

assetIds.description: Optional list of CFD/RWA asset identifiers to tag in the post.

repostId.description: Optional ID of an existing post to repost/quote.

content.description: Comment text content. Must be between 1 and 5000 characters.
content.example: Great analysis! I agree with your take on the technicals.

legalDocuments.description: Array of URLs for legal document images (title deed, IDs, etc.)

spvName.description: SPV legal entity that holds the underlying asset

title.example: Should we sell the project outright for 3.5 billion?

errors.description: Detailed error information by field, domain rule, or external provider.

traceId.description: Request trace id for debugging across services.

BadRequest.description: Malformed request payload or failed domain validation.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication is missing, invalid, revoked, or expired.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not allowed to access or mutate this resource.

TooManyRequests.description: Rate limit exceeded or too many OTP/password attempts.

InternalServerError.description: Unexpected server error or upstream dependency failure.
